title: ECCC Updates Clean Fuel Regulations Guidance
content: ECCCâ€™s Low Carbon Fuels Division has released an updated factsheet on the Clean Fuel Regulations (CFR), providing additional guidance on credit creation and tracking, as well as annual adjustments under Section 89 and carbon-intensity (CI) pathway reports. Additionally, ECCC reminds stakeholders of the April 30th, 2025 deadline for submitting the Material Balance Report and its verification, with an accompanying factsheet available for reference. This document will be updated periodically with FAQs to assist registered creators and foreign suppliers. Moreover, a revision has been made to Section 9.4 of the Fuel LCA Model CI Calculation Specifications (Version 4, January 2025), adding a new row to Table 9, which establishes energy efficiency ratios for eligible electric vehicles, enabling credit creation starting in the 2025 compliance period.
author: Analysts Account
